codeReview.summary: Feature was already fully implemented by a prior worker. The worker session 82abe069 correctly verified the existing implementation. SqliteMemoryStore implements all required MemoryStore trait methods with complete CRUD, search, and filtering functionality.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill 'rust-worker' specified in features.json does not exist in the skill registry. Worker had to deviate from procedure and verify existing implementation instead.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows: Tool Result: Error: Skill "rust-worker" not found. Handoff discoveredIssues confirms: 'The specified skill rust-worker does not exist in the skill registry.'

summary: Review of memory-sqlite-store. The SqliteMemoryStore implementation is complete, correct, and fully implements the MemoryStore trait with CRUD operations (store/get/update/delete), search with multiple filters (query_text, block_types, labels, language, task_type), and get_by_type/get_by_label methods. All VAL-MEMORY-* assertions are covered by existing tests (5 passing). The worker session correctly verified pre-existing code when it discovered the rust-worker skill didn't exist. No blocking issues found.
